sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71272" key="numfa/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυμφ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, pecul. fem. of foreg., <sense id="n71272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πύλαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:44:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.44.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
